title: A Letter for Luffy
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on a letter for luffy within the Tea Party Invitation storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: SHFWO

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: How the hell did you come to find that out!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A foolish question.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: One of the emperors of the pirate world herself,

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: Big mom, is our boss.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If she tells you to die, you die.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Do everything she tells you, as if your life depends on it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You better at least be prepared to do that much,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If you don't want to end up anyone's underling.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Sanji! Are you okay!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What did that man whisper in your ear!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Get me a pen and paper.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: A note for straw hat, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Huhu...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: give this to lofty and the others.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Nami-San, Chopper, Brook...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Please believe me... It was not my intent to keep things hidden from you... my friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I honestly never expected to have to face this part of my past ever again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And now I've got no choice but to go and put an end to it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What? I? Not we?

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: I'm sensing a powerful presence outside. It's probably one of the minks.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ready? Watch your heads on the way down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: UWA AAA AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: AAA AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: GyaA AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AAAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He helped his friends escape!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What about me..!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: that bastard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: VANISH

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What AAA AT!?

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Don't move a muscle! Or I'll perforate your precious genius scientist's skull!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Damn you, black leg!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: All that crap about the wedding made me realize...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the

summary: A Letter for Luffy: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
